titles.title: A bill to amend title 31, United States Code, to require certain financial institutions to verify the citizenship and legal status of individuals, and for other purposes.
A bill to amend title 31, United States Code, to require certain financial institutions to verify the citizenship and legal status of individuals, and for other purposes.

action.text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Banking, Housing, and Urban Affairs.

committee.name: Senate Banking, Housing, and Urban Affairs
